name: RBZ NPS Risk-Based Guidelines
description: Self-assessment against RBZ NPS risk-based guidelines.

questions.text: Is there a documented policy for governance & oversight?

guidance.title: Is there a documented policy for governance & oversight?
guidance.risk: For governance-and-oversight-q1, this control supports regulatory inspections, prudential risk oversight, and enforceable corrective action tracking by proving that 'Is there a documented policy for governance & oversight?' is governed, executed, and reviewable within Governance & Oversight.
actions: In Governance & Oversight, close gap governance-and-oversight-q1 by formalizing control execution for 'Is there a documented policy for governance & oversight?'. Document accountable ownership, implementation milestones, and operating cadence aligned to RBZ payment-system supervision, transaction integrity, and operational resilience for financial institutions.
evidence: Approved procedure or standard mapped to governance-and-oversight-q1 and section 'Governance & Oversight'.
Dated operating records showing execution of 'Is there a documented policy for governance & oversight?' over the latest review cycle.
Management or committee evidence confirming oversight decisions and remediation tracking for governance-and-oversight-q1.

questions.recommendation: In Governance & Oversight, close gap governance-and-oversight-q1 by formalizing control execution for 'Is there a documented policy for governance & oversight?'.
